context: Tests whether the agent uses ioredis for Redis caching, configures the client with correct resilience settings, applies proper key naming conventions, uses fire-and-forget cache writes, and leverages Redis pipelines for bulk operations.

checklist.name: Uses ioredis package
checklist.description: Imports from 'ioredis' (not 'redis', 'node-redis', or another Redis client library)

checklist.name: maxRetriesPerRequest setting
checklist.description: Redis client is constructed with maxRetriesPerRequest: 3

checklist.name: enableReadyCheck setting
checklist.description: Redis client is constructed with enableReadyCheck: true

checklist.name: Retry strategy with cap
checklist.description: retryStrategy function uses Math.min with a 2000ms cap (e.g., Math.min(times * 50, 2000))

checklist.name: Key prefix pattern
checklist.description: Product cache keys use a consistent prefix pattern (e.g., 'product:' followed by the product ID)

checklist.name: Slug index key
checklist.description: Products are also indexed by slug using a separate Redis key (e.g., 'product:slug:{slug}' or similar) that stores the product ID

checklist.name: Fire-and-forget cache write
checklist.description: In the getOrFetch / cache-aside method, the cache write is NOT awaited — it is fired with .catch() for error handling rather than awaited before returning the response

checklist.name: Pipeline for bulk operations
checklist.description: When warming the cache for multiple products, redis.pipeline() is used and a single pipeline.exec() call is made rather than individual setex calls per product

checklist.name: setex for TTL
checklist.description: Cache entries are stored with setex (or set with EX option) rather than plain set with no expiry

checklist.name: Slug key cleanup on invalidation
checklist.description: When invalidating a product, both the product ID key AND the slug key are deleted together

checklist.name: Product TTL value
checklist.description: Product cache TTL is set to 300 seconds (5 minutes) by default

checklist.name: maxmemory-policy mentioned
checklist.description: Redis configuration or comments include mention of maxmemory and/or maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru to prevent unbounded memory growth
